Features

Built for every match

Everything happens inside one lightweight desktop app — record, review, clip, and cash out without leaving your game.

INSIGHTS — DASHBOARDREC
Auto-detected highlightsKills, aces & clutches tagged for you Frame-by-frame VOD reviewScrub the timeline, study every round One-click clip & shareTrim and post to Discord or TikTok Live Shards counterWatch your Shards stack as you play

Auto-record

Every kill, clutch, and ace — captured before you even think about it.

Zero FPS drop

Hardware-accelerated capture that never touches your frames.

One-click share

Clip it and ship it to Discord, TikTok, or the community feed.

Ban safe & private

No injection, no code in game memory. Your data stays yours.
